data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external-to-internal entity link mapping.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for external-to-internal entity link mapping. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or endpoints related to this mapping, indicating a clear gap in the implementation. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but no evidence supports its existence or successful operation.
gaps: No evidence of external-to-internal entity link mapping.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
